title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – Project Associate
shortInfo: Tripura University Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 Project Associate-1 post for candidates with M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent Life Sciences qualification, with email applications accepted until 10-06-2026 through the official website tripurauniv.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: Tripura University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura University Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 Project Associate-1 post for candidates with M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent Life Sciences qualification, with email applications accepted until 10-06-2026 through the official website tripurauniv.ac.in.

age_limit.maximum_age: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the Tripura University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent degree in Life Sciences with basic knowledge of handling microorganisms.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent degree in Life Sciences with basic knowledge of handling microorganisms.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Tripura University Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Microbiology or an equivalent degree in Life Sciences with basic knowledge of handling microorganisms.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: How can I apply for this government job at Tripura University?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Project Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is BT/PR51898/NER/95/2096/2024.

faq.question: Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is contractual, offering a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: Tripura University has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate-1 post.
